summary: PDF-to-Questions parsing feature and all interactive question types fully tested. Backend parse-pdf endpoint works correctly with pdfplumber + Claude AI. Student pages render all 5 question types (multiple_choice, true_false, short_answer, matching, essay) as interactive form fields. Form submission successful.

issues: Console shows React hydration warnings about <span> in <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/ai-grading/parse-pdf endpoint (ai_grading.py line 856-982): Correctly uses pdfplumber for text extraction and Claude Sonnet 4.6 for AI parsing with 90s timeout
StudentAssignment.js properly renders all 5 question types with correct form controls
Matching questions use dropdown selectors populated from left_items/right_items
Per-question instructions display in blue info box (data-testid='question-instructions-{id}')
No PDF iframe shown when assignment has parsed questions (correct behavior)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all question types render and submit correctly)

seed_data_creation: Used pre-existing test assignments: token 32d746a9c0bf (Science Quiz with PDF-parsed questions), token 76006fe2f3f8 (Matching & Instructions Demo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF-to-questions parsing feature is complete. The parse-pdf endpoint accepts file_url and total_points, extracts text via pdfplumber, and uses Claude AI to convert into structured questions. Student pages at /assignment/{token} are public. All 5 question types render with proper form controls: multiple_choice (radio), true_false (radio), short_answer (input), matching (dropdowns), essay (textarea).

POST /api/ai-grading/parse-pdf.details: Endpoint extracts text from PDF and returns structured questions with question_type, question_text, points, options/matching_pairs

matching_rendering.details: Renders with left items and dropdown selectors for right items

per_question_instructions.details: Displays in blue info box with Info icon when present

student_submission.details: Student can fill all question types and submit successfully

no_pdf_iframe_for_parsed.details: Assignments with parsed questions show interactive form fields, not PDF iframe
